title: sakalond/StableGen GitHub Repository
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for optional offline texture authoring and license-risk assessment.
claims_supported: StableGen is a Blender add-on for generative 3D texturing and asset generation.
StableGen uses ComfyUI-backed pipelines and can work with generated 3D meshes.
claims_not_supported: That StableGen is suitable as an embedded runtime or distributed dependency under a copyleft-avoidance policy.
That all model weights and optional pipelines have commercial-friendly licenses.
